title: Please rename the master branch to the main branch.

comments.body:
***Supporting/Required changes:***

- [x] Update `$DEST_BRANCH` value in `.cirrus.yml`
- [x] Fix `$SKOPEO_CI_TAG` value in `.cirrus.yml` for [containers/image](https://github.com/containers/image) repository, when skopeo repo. is renamed.
- [x] Fix several links in [containers/buildah](https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/3227#issuecomment-861777534) `install.md`

(I'll update this comment as I find more)
